digest.title: Wedding season bookings up 44% YoY in Oct-Dec window
digest.summary: Salon bookings for bridal packages surge in October–December. Salons that activate bridal offers by Oct 15 capture 3x more leads than those who activate in November.

patient_content_library.title: 5 hair care tips for Delhi winter
patient_content_library.body: Delhi winters dry out hair fast. Tip 1: Oil twice a week. Tip 2: Lukewarm water only. Tip 3: Trim split ends every 6 weeks. Ask us about our winter hair care package!

seasonal_beats.note: wedding/bridal season peak — highest demand for bridal packages
post-wedding lull — good time for loyalty offers and referral drives
